revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:名水百選]] [[zh:Category:名水百選]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Amanohashidate]].

[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:名水百選]] [[zh:Category:名水百選]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Amanohashidate]]. [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9595982)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Moving from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] to [[Category:Japanese titles]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Japanese titles]] to [[Category:Japanese language category names]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q9595982}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:名水百選]] [[zh:Category:名水百選]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Japanese language category names]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: EmmaBot moved page [[Category:名水百選]] to [[Category:100 Selected waters of Japan]]: Bot: move untranslated category to English equivalent [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22534966935|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{wikidata link|Q9595982}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:名水百選]] [[zh:Category:名水百選]] <!--categories--> [[Category:Japanese language category names]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=100_Selected_waters_of_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
